items.name_cn:
Available in Diamond White
Dior D-Joy bag
Fashion is indeed cyclical, returning to a vintage Lady Dior. The special matte calfskin diamond quilted pattern has eight cut faces for a structured look. The full matte hardware, short chain + long strap combo is absolutely god-tier!!
Strong retro chic, suitable for any occasion.
It is definitely the pinnacle of "lady" bags, definitely standing out sisters.
26 x 13.5 x 5cm

DIOR caro vanity Small Vanity Case

items.name_cn:
Available in Oblique Grey, Medium
DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring Collection
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play the game.
The tote you can carry is here! Simply amazing.
A viral hit derived from the most classic tote.
More and more people love carrying large bags; it's truly gender-neutral.
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are effortless.
The shape holds up well and doesn't collapse; I wish I could carry it every day.
Bag lovers can buy this with your eyes closed!!
36×16×27cm,

items.name_cn:
Avocado Green·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory patent leather cowhide, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm
